subcodes.first_line: O servant of the celestial Threshold! His honor Murtaza returneth to those regions, bearing a gift from 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه کبریا جناب مرتضی مراجعت بانصفحات مینمایند و ارمغانی از عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
